german_requirement.title: Majority of Roles Do Not Require German Skills
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant share of positions remains unclassified, highlighting accessibility challenges in the job market.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate, Creating Significant Imbalance
pm_type.subtitle: A substantial gap exists between Core PMs and Customer-facing PMs, highlighting a concentration in product management roles.

seniority.title: Mid-level Roles Are Most Prevalent
seniority.subtitle: Mid-level positions account for 29% of the workforce, while senior roles make up 44%.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant majority prefer on-site work, highlighting limited flexibility in current work arrangements.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise Remains Emerging in Job Market
ai.subtitle: Only 19% of roles prioritize AI as a core responsibility, indicating limited mainstream adoption.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Equal Representation Across Sectors
industry.subtitle: No single sector dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
